name: Italian-Style Oven Dinner
recipeIngredient: 1 can (28 oz) Italian peeled tomatoes, drained and cut up
1 lb Italian sausage, cut into 2-inch chunks
1 Chicken breast, 3 pounds, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a baking pan, combine the pepper, tomatoes, and sausage chunks.
2. Sprinkle with garlic.
3. Arrange chicken on top of the mixture.
4. Brush the chicken with olive oil.
5. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
6. Bake, uncovered, for 1 hour and 15 minutes, until tender. Baste frequently.
Makes 6-8 servings.
